querySurfaces.label: feed latest GLOBAL first page
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: GLOBAL 최신글 목록이 sequential scan 또는 sort로 떨어질 수 있다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Post" WHERE "scope" = 'GLOBAL' AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 21;

querySurfaces.label: feed best GLOBAL first page
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: 베스트글 정렬이 like/comment/view/createdAt sort 비용으로 커질 수 있다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Post" WHERE "scope" = 'GLOBAL' AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY "likeCount" DESC, "commentCount" DESC, "viewCount" DESC, "createdAt" DESC, "id" DESC LIMIT 21;

querySurfaces.label: local board/type feed
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: 지역+게시판 조합에서 neighborhood/type 필터 후 정렬 비용이 커질 수 있다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Post" WHERE "neighborhoodId" = $1 AND "type" = $2 AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 21;

querySurfaces.label: ranked search title/content/structured text
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: pg_trgm/GIN이 없거나 LIKE 패턴이 index를 타지 못하면 검색이 가장 먼저 병목이 된다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Post" WHERE "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND ("title" ILIKE $1 OR "content" ILIKE $1 OR "structuredSearchText" ILIKE $1) LIMIT 80;

querySurfaces.label: post detail comments
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: 상세 댓글 페이지가 postId 필터 후 createdAt 정렬에서 느려질 수 있다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Comment" WHERE "postId" = $1 ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 51;

querySurfaces.label: admin report queue
querySurfaces.riskIfSlow: 운영 큐 count/list가 신고 누적 후 관리자 화면 병목이 될 수 있다.
querySurfaces.nextExplain: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM "Report" WHERE "status" = 'PENDING' AND "targetType" IN ('POST', 'COMMENT') ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC, "id" DESC LIMIT 25;
